message:
feat(daemon): Add client with auto-spawn and retry

Implements bd-rl9: Daemon client for communicating with the model daemon.

Features:
- Auto-spawn daemon if not running
- Exponential backoff retry on failure (50ms, 100ms, 200ms)
- Configurable timeouts (connect: 2s, request: 30s)
- High-level API: health(), embed(), rerank(), status(), shutdown()
- InferenceMode enum for daemon/direct fallback pattern
- Socket path from XF_DAEMON_SOCK env or default /tmp/xf-daemon-$USER.sock

The client transparently handles:
- Connection to existing daemon
- Spawning daemon via `xf daemon start` if needed
- Waiting for daemon socket with polling backoff

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
